signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Players with this ability are more likely to succeed at and attempt diving catches and swats.
Defenders with this ability force more catch tackle knockouts in man-to-man versus short routes less than 10 yards from LoS
Defenders with this ability generally react much faster to receiver cut moves when in man coverage and outside the numbers
Passers with this ability receive better pass blocking from their offensive linemen.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all lob or touch passes (except high/low and cross-body throws).
When playing from behind, players with this ability can easily enter the Zone.
Defenders with this ability force more catch tackle knockouts in man-to-man versus short routes less than 10 yards from LoS
Defenders with this ability will repair the fatigue of all defensive linemen on any 3rd or 4th down
Defenders with this ability are granted a free pass rush move once per play after spending stamina to perform one
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks within 5 yards of the goal line.
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Avoid stumbling when carrying the ball
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
